title: AI coding tools: GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Codeium, CodeWhisperer, Replit AI, Cody, Windsurf, Tabnine, Lovable, Mobb | Mobb posted on the topic | LinkedIn
text:
🤖 The tools behind the Vibe Coding movement are here — are you ready for them? AI coding tools are transforming how developers build, ship, and scale. But with speed comes risk. In this breakdown, we spotlight the top tools accelerating AI-first development: 💻 GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Codeium, CodeWhisperer ⚙️ Replit AI, Cody, Windsurf, Tabnine, Lovable 🔐 Mobb — for secure, automated remediation Plus: what every AppSec team needs to know about their security gaps. 📖 Top AI Coding Tools Powering the Vibe Coding Movement 👉 https://lnkd.in/eVTpqRwM #VibeCoding #AItools #DevSecOps #AppSec #DeveloperExperience #SecureByDefault

🐞 Debugging with AI: Fix Code Faster, Smarter Every developer hits bugs — but now, AI can help squash them in seconds. With tools like Codium, GitHub Copilot, and CodeWhisperer, you can: ✅ Identify syntax and logic errors instantly ✅ Get step-by-step explanations of what’s broken ✅ Generate bug-free suggestions and test cases ✅ Learn as you fix — great for beginners and pros alike Instead of staring at broken code for hours, let AI spot issues, suggest fixes, and explain why — right inside your editor. It’s not just faster coding. It’s smarter debugging. #DebuggingWithAI #AIforDevelopers #CodeFixing #SmartCoding #GitHubCopilot #Codium #AItools #ProgrammingHelp #CleanCode #AIinTech #DevLife

At the TRAE SF Vibe Coding Hackathon, Yunhao Jiao explored how developers can use AI Testing MCP (TestSprite) on TRAE to automatically test, debug, and enhance code quality. In this session you'll learn: - Integrating MCP with TRAE for automated workflows - Real-world bug catching & reliability gains - Best practices for AI-powered testing This session is part of the TRAE Hackathon Series, where builders and engineers showcase how TRAE are redefining the future of building software. #DeveloperTools #TRAE #Hackathon Full video: https://lnkd.in/g2ykKwFe

🚀 Anthropic just dropped Claude Sonnet 4.5 — and it might be the best coding model yet. Here is why developers are paying attention: 🔹 77.2% accuracy on SWE-Bench Verified (real GitHub PRs) 🔹 61.4% success on OSWorld — a huge leap from 43.9% 🔹 Can now run 30 hours autonomously, up from 7 hours 🔹 Outperforms even Anthropic’s flagship Opus 4.1 in some domains But this release is more than numbers: Claude Code now has a VS Code extension, prompt history search, and checkpoints. Claude Agent SDK gives developers the same foundation Anthropic uses for building agents. The wild experiment “Imagine with Claude” shows what live, disposable software generation could look like. 💡 As Cursor CEO Michael Truell said: “We are seeing state-of-the-art coding performance from Claude Sonnet 4.5, with significant improvements on longer horizon tasks.” 👉 Same pricing. More power. A serious step toward AI as a true coding partner. Read more of my blog: https://lnkd.in/dChDJ8Ff #ClaudeAI #Sonnet45 #AI #Coding #Developers #Anthropic

Droid + OpenRouter: The Dream Team Crushing AI Coding in 2025 🚀🤖 Droid from Factory AI is the undisputed champ, topping Terminal-Bench at #1 with agentic wizardry for end-to-end dev: clean code, auto-testing, deployments that just work. Devs call it "the best engineer in the world" for slashing SDLC time by 3x. Pair it with OpenRouter 🔌✨: The slick LLM broker unlocking 400+ models (Gemini 2.5, Claude, open-source gems) via one API—blazing ~25ms latency, zero infra drama, and mix-match freedom without lock-in. Privacy-first, multimodal magic for any workflow. Together? Unstoppable productivity boosters. Who's building with them? 👇 https://lnkd.in/gKpa_snd PS: Ask me in a couple of hours and my response might have already changed! #AICoding #DevTools #DroidAI

🧩 GenAI for Developers: My Toolkit 💡 “My AI toolbox in 2025 isn’t just VSCode and GitHub—it includes MCP, Copilot, HuggingFace, LLaMA, LangChain, and FAISS.” As developers, our toolkit is evolving faster than ever. The rise of Generative AI has transformed the way we code, debug, and build intelligent applications. 🚀 Tools I keep in my daily workflow: MCP → Local AI runtime for personalized development. GitHub Copilot → My AI coding partner. HuggingFace & LLaMA → For models, fine-tuning, and experimentation. LangChain → To build LLM-powered apps with context & reasoning. FAISS → Vector search backbone for RAG and knowledge retrieval. --- 🔥 Why it matters: Speeds up prototyping and deployment. Makes data-driven apps more intelligent. Shifts focus from just writing code → to building AI-powered experiences. --- 👉 Over to you: What’s in your GenAI toolbox right now? Which tool has made the biggest difference in your developer journey? Any underrated tools that deserve more attention? Let’s swap toolkits and inspire each other. Drop your picks in the comments! 💬 #GenAI #Developers #BigDatapedia #AItoolkit #LangChain #HuggingFace #LLaMA #FAISS #Copilot
